annotations.title: Vessel through the temple.
annotations.text: <mn>◦</mn> He could not abide to see the Temple of God profaned, no nor suffered those things to be done in it, which otherwise were not unlawful but honest, if they had been done in due place. How much less can he abide the profaning of Churches now with Heretical service and preaching of heresy and blasphemy?

annotations.title: Den of thieves.
annotations.text: If the Temple was then a den of thieves, because of profane and secular merchandise: how much more now, when the house appointed for the Holy Sacrifice and Sacrament of the Body of Christ, is made a den for the Ministers of Calvin's bread?
